summary: Implementation plan for 6 vault/blockchain security and architecture fixes: (1) DB transactions with BEGIN/COMMIT around all vault mutations, (2) Row-level locking with SELECT FOR UPDATE, (3) Zod input validation schemas, (4) Vault-specific rate limiting, (5) Route deduplication between vault.mjs and tokens.mjs, (6) Adding remaining analysis to internal index.html. Includes verification plan with existing test suite and proposed new tests.
